tier1_validation.reason: EN 'eoseungsaengak trail' is rendered as 御乘生岳登山道 in line 'The Eoseungsaengak Trailhead' / 御乘生岳登山口位于 御林木探访服务中心. 御乘生岳登山口 is acceptable Mainland zh for trailhead. Glossary expects 御乘生岳登山道 verbatim, but the variant 登山口 (trailhead) is contextually correct here.

Target uses 联合国教科文组织世界自然遗产 (description) and 世界遗产 (whyOnRoute). Glossary key 联合国教科文组织世界遗产 is satisfied — 'world heritage' surface form simply uses the natural-heritage variant. Glossary token check is over-strict.
EN 'UNESCO World Heritage' compressed to 世界遗产 only. For SEO and brand discoverability the full 联合国教科文组织 prefix should appear at least once per highlights set.
tier1_validation.suggested_fix: Replace '2007年世界遗产' with '2007年联合国教科文组织世界自然遗产'.

tier1_validation.reason: Text already uses 直奔码头 / 抵达 etc. The phrase 'drop-off' as a noun is naturally absorbed; glossary expects 下车点 only when the EN noun appears as a discrete term. Native-tone preservation is appropriate.
'码头门口下车' translates 'drop-off at terminal'. 下车 (verb) is fine but the EN canonical noun should map to 下车点.
tier1_validation.suggested_fix: 码头门口下车点。

tier1_validation.reason: EN 'autumn foliage' is rendered as 秋红 (a poetic compression) in 春樱、秋红、冬雪. This is idiomatic Mainland zh. Tier1 string-match is over-strict.
EN 'cherry blossom' rendered as 春樱 (compressed but natural). Glossary 樱花 satisfied semantically.
Same as #5 — 秋红 acceptable for autumn foliage.
EN 'day trip' present but target uses 一日往返 (less canonical). Glossary 一日游 is the SEO-friendly form for product discovery.
tier1_validation.suggested_fix: Replace 可从釜山一日往返 with 可从釜山一日游往返.

tier1_validation.reason: Latin tokens (Nammun, Tongdak Wang-Galbi, tteokbokki, eomuk, hotteok, Rodeo, SBA) appear without zh equivalents. Native readers expect 通鸡王排骨 / 辣炒年糕 / 鱼糕 / 糖饼 etc.
tier1_validation.suggested_fix: Render foods as 通鸡王排骨, 辣炒年糕 (tteokbokki), 鱼糕 (eomuk), 糖饼 (hotteok); replace 'Nammun=南门' with 南门 (Nammun); leave SBA/Rodeo with zh gloss.

tier1_validation.reason: Cafe brand names left in Latin. While brand names per guidelines stay in English, surrounding nouns (Donuts) and Hangul Bomnal/Gonae need zh gloss for native readability.
tier1_validation.suggested_fix: Add zh gloss for Gonae (郭支), Bomnal (春日 / Bomnal), retain brand names but add zh classifier (e.g., Randy's Donuts 甜甜圈).

tier1_validation.reason: Field is a list of cafe brand names. Per guidelines brand names remain English; 'Aewol the Sunset' is a brand. The 涯月 city name is already used in the descriptive context.

EN 'UN Memorial Cemetery' should be 联合国纪念公墓. Need to verify literal target text — flag retained.
tier1_validation.suggested_fix: Ensure 联合国纪念公墓 appears wherever EN 'UN Memorial Cemetery' is referenced.

tier1_validation.reason: Snippet '海东龙宫寺停车场 (收费，依Visit Busan官方信息)' — Visit Busan is the brand name of the city tourism org and stays in Latin per brand-name policy. 釜山 already used in POI name.
Snippet doesn't show 'haenyeo' literal; haenyeo is rendered semantically as 现役 (active) in elision. Other highlights in this POI use 海女 — confirm at top of highlights list.

tier1_validation.reason: 济州 used in 济州黑猪 etc. throughout target. EN 'Jeju' satisfied — checker may have keyed on phrase fragment.

tier1_validation.reason: Snippet '不为个人绕行至酒店 (小团固定时刻)' — no discrete drop-off noun appears; the EN phrase merged into operational note.
EN 'hydrangea festival' rendered 绣球花庆典. Glossary form 绣球花节 is more idiomatic and search-friendly. 庆典 is grandiloquent for a community 节.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 周边森林是 稀有植物栖息地，包括 韩国油点草...
tier2_native_tone.detail: Single occurrence of 包括 in entire zh corpus — house style mandates 包含.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 周边森林是稀有植物栖息地，包含 韩国油点草...

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 桥身刻有七仙女浮雕的仙临桥同样令人印象深刻
tier2_native_tone.detail: 令人印象深刻 is an AI-tone calque of 'impressive' that reads as machine-translated.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: ...的仙临桥同样值得驻足取景 / 同样精彩 / 也颇具看点.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 御里牧以中等徒步强度(团组步行 1.5–2 公里)即可呈现
tier2_native_tone.detail: EN 'walking intensity' rendered 徒步强度. House mandates 徒步难度 / 步行难度. 强度 in Mainland zh suggests workout intensity, not trail difficulty.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 御里牧以中等徒步难度...

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 易至中等强度——和缓的山路；大部分婴儿车可通行
tier2_native_tone.detail: 强度 should be 难度 in walking field.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 易至中等难度——和缓的山路；大部分婴儿车可通行.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 爱宝乐园高强度(轻易 5–10 公里——大型山地园区)——韩国民俗村同样较高
tier2_native_tone.detail: 高强度 reads as 'high-intensity workout' in zh; should be 难度高 / 步行难度大 for walking field.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 爱宝乐园步行难度大(轻易 5–10 公里)——韩国民俗村同样较高.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 步行强度明显低于东线，室内备案密度也好
tier2_native_tone.detail: 步行强度 should be 步行难度.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 步行难度明显低于东线，室内备选密度也更好.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 司机兼向导将停于南山艺场停车场或南山缆车站
tier2_native_tone.detail: 司机兼向导 — 向导 should be 导游 per house style (英语导游).
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 司机兼导游.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 观景台全景涵盖 汉拿山白鹿潭火口、黄海与南部寄生火山锥群
tier2_native_tone.detail: EN says 'Yellow Sea on a clear day'. From 汉拿山西麓 the visible body of water westward IS the Yellow Sea, but Korean readers expect 西海. Confirm intent — both are acceptable, 黄海 is more international.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: ...废弃巷道又在约 40年间用作虾酱 (saeujeot) 发酵储藏库 ——洞内常年约12°C恒温与高湿环境，正适合jeotgal (韩式发酵海产) 熟成
tier2_native_tone.detail: Latin tokens saeujeot, jeotgal embedded. Native zh readers prefer 虾酱(saeujeot) plus 韩式酱菜（jeotgal，发酵海产）. Already mostly glossed but jeotgal solo Latin still appears.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 适合 jeotgal（韩式发酵海产，젓갈）熟成 → 适合各类发酵海产（jeotgal）熟成.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 崖顶上方的 影岛灯塔是釜山最古老的灯塔,建于 1906 年(韩国第 10 座),其现代继任塔楼于 2004 年加建
tier2_native_tone.detail: 现代继任塔楼 is a literal calque of 'modern successor tower'. Native zh prefers 现代新塔 / 现代重建塔楼.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: ...其现代新塔楼于 2004 年加建.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: **'超越极限之光'雕塑**(池率元景李)
tier2_native_tone.detail: '池率元景李' is mangled. Korean artist name 지율 / 원경 / 이 likely means '池律元 + 景李' or similar; unclear without EN. The name appears to be a chained romanization read as four characters and may be wrong.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: Verify against EN source; likely a single artist name needing proper Hangul-to-Hanja/transliteration.

tier2_native_tone.detail: Inconsistency: 99,000 m² vs 330,580 m² (initial 100,000 pyeong) — these are the same number expressed differently but the rendering is confusing. Also 100,000 坪 not localized to 10 万坪.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 约 99,000 平方米（初为 10 万坪 / 约 33 万平方米）...

tier2_native_tone.detail: 99,000 m² ≠ 80 英亩 (80 acres = 323,749 m²). Conflicts with description (which says 330,580 m² for 100,000 pyeong). Confirm the canonical figure.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 约 33 万平方米 / 80 英亩 (or align to EN source figure).

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 1970 年由海登大师 (해등 큰스님) 创建
tier2_native_tone.detail: Hangul 해등 transliterates to 海登 (Haedeung), but Korean Buddhist Hanja is typically 海等 / 海燈 / 海得. 海登 reads as a casual transliteration. Verify temple's Hanja spelling.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: Verify temple's official Hanja-spelled name (likely 海得/海燈) and use that.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 倍增于 33 神祇佛教众神之名
tier2_native_tone.detail: Phrase '倍增于 33 神祇佛教众神之名' is a near-literal calque of EN 'multiplied from the 33 deities' — reads awkwardly in zh. 神祇 + 佛教众神 is also a redundancy.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 致敬韩国统一祈愿，将佛教传统中的 33 尊神灵之数倍增至 1001 尊.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 济州黑猪是韩国指定的天然纪念物
tier2_native_tone.detail: Naturally phrased; 天然纪念物 is glossary-correct. No issue.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: Anthony Bourdain《Parts Unknown》首尔篇及 Netflix《Street Food: Asia》
tier2_native_tone.detail: Show titles in Latin — acceptable per brand-name policy. However, '韩国首座' in same paragraph contains heavy Latin density; reader experience would benefit from at least one zh gloss for Bourdain ('美食家安东尼·伯尔顿').
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 美食家 Anthony Bourdain（安东尼·伯尔顿）的《Parts Unknown》首尔篇...

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 1592年壬辰倭乱中被焚毁，在废墟中沉寂273年
tier2_native_tone.detail: Native, well-paced. No issue.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 鹿山场与甘马场牧场
tier2_native_tone.detail: 甘马场 already contains 场 (field/farm); appending 牧场 is redundant. Should be '鹿山场与甘马场' or '鹿山牧场与甘马牧场'.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 鹿山场与甘马场（朝鲜王朝时期的御马牧场）.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 桂洞路(北村六景附近的'韩屋屋顶巷')
tier2_native_tone.detail: 桂洞 is the actual road name (Gyedong-gil 계동길). Korean -길 = 路 in zh is acceptable. However 桂洞街 also seen in some sources; verify glossary preference. Consistent across two occurrences.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 古土哥竹林与第二片竹林鼓励游客拍摄
tier2_native_tone.detail: 古土哥 looks like a romanization-mangled place name (likely 'Goto-ge / 굳으게 / 고토게'). No such standard Korean place name; appears to be a hallucination or OCR error from EN.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: Verify in EN source; replace with correct transliteration of original Hangul name (e.g., 孟宗 / 旧道 / etc.).

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 韩剧取景史使其成为 韩流粉丝的强力吸引点
tier2_native_tone.detail: 强力吸引点 is calque of 'powerful attraction'. Native zh: 必访打卡地 / 朝圣地.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 韩剧取景史使其成为韩流粉丝的必访打卡地.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 桥在朝鲜王朝时期失存(可能毁于洪水或火灾)
tier2_native_tone.detail: 失存 is not standard Mainland zh — appears to be a calque coined to translate 'lost' (as in 'no longer extant'). Native: 不复存在 / 早已倾圮 / 毁失.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 桥在朝鲜王朝时期不复存在(可能毁于洪水或火灾).

tier2_native_tone.snippet: **桥每晚日落至约23:00亮灯**；白天造访则能在更清亮的光线下观赏木作工艺
tier2_native_tone.detail: 更清亮的光线 is an awkward calque. Native: 自然光线 / 日间光线 / 阳光下.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 白天造访则能在自然光下观赏木作工艺.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 桥本身横跨溪谷，平整通行
tier2_native_tone.detail: 平整通行 is calque-y. Native: 桥面平整 / 行走平稳.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: 桥本身横跨溪谷，桥面平整易行.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 经韩国旅游公社官方认定为韩国最长的无桥墩悬索桥
tier2_native_tone.detail: 无桥墩悬索桥 — 悬索桥 (suspension bridge) by definition has no central piers; '无桥墩' adds clarity but redundant with 悬索. Acceptable for emphasis.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: **免费观景台小妙招**：提前预约N Grill或HanCook即可
tier2_native_tone.detail: Naturally phrased; 小妙招 is colloquial Mainland.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: Ssamzigil 文化巷
tier2_native_tone.detail: Ssamzigil (쌈지길) commercial complex — Latin retained; gloss as 三吉里 (transliteration) or 쌈지길文化巷 with zh.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: Ssamzigil 文化巷（삼지길）.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 迷你巴随后沿 1135 号公路前往济州市
tier2_native_tone.detail: 迷你巴 = minivan/minibus — accepted Mainland-zh borrowing; 你 in compound 迷你 is allowed per house rule.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: ...曾出现于 **2014年韩剧《来自星星的你 (별에서 온 그대)》**
tier2_native_tone.detail: 你 inside drama title 《来自星星的你》 is allowed per house rule.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: 2006 年 MBC 韩剧《你来自哪颗星》
tier2_native_tone.detail: 《你来自哪颗星》 is not a standard zh title for a 2006 MBC drama. Most likely the EN was 'My Lovely Sam Soon (내 이름은 김삼순)' or another 2006 MBC title — verify. The phrasing reads like a literal back-translation guess.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: Verify against EN source and use the official zh drama title.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: Repeated motifs: 锚点 (25×), 收尾 (23×), 招牌 (57×), 标志性 (24×), 核心 (31×)
tier2_native_tone.detail: Tour-product copy across 97 POIs leans heavily on a small set of structural anchors (锚点/收尾/招牌/标志性/核心). This produces a templated 'AI tour brochure' cadence. Native human-edited tourism copy varies vocabulary: 重头戏 / 压轴 / 招牌之作 / 代表性 / 名片 / 打卡点 / 必访 / 看家.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: Diversify: replace ~30% of 锚点 → 重头戏 / 压轴 / 名片; replace ~30% of 标志性 → 代表性 / 经典 / 招牌; reduce 招牌 frequency by 50%.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: Punctuation: target uses both half-width (,) and full-width (，) commas; both ASCII and zh quotes
tier2_native_tone.detail: Mixed punctuation across files. Some POIs use 中文全角标点 (，。；：) while others use ASCII (, . ; :). Mainland zh tourism copy strongly prefers full-width punctuation. ASCII parentheses ( ) are also mixed with （）.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: Normalize all to full-width Chinese punctuation (，。；：（）「」《》) per Mainland publishing standards.

tier2_native_tone.snippet: Hangul retained in all 97 POIs (e.g., (어승생악), (해등 큰스님), (한국민속촌))
tier2_native_tone.detail: Hangul preserved in parentheses for proper-noun authentication. Acceptable practice per guidelines, but density (every 3rd line carries Hangul) may overwhelm zh readers. Consider Hangul only on first occurrence per page.
tier2_native_tone.suggested_fix: Limit Hangul gloss to first mention of each proper noun within a single document; subsequent mentions zh-only.

summary.overall_assessment: zh translation quality is high overall: glossary terms 佛国寺/汉拿山/济州/庆州/釜山/首尔 fully respected; 您 used 50× as 2nd-person pronoun with no improper 你 (the 5 你 hits are all inside drama titles 《来自星星的你》, 《苦尽柑来遇见你》, 《欢迎来到三达里》 etc., compliant with house rule); 包含 used 37× vs 包括 only 1× (compliance ~97%). Two recurring tier-2 issues: (1) 强度 used in 5 walking/intensity contexts where 难度 / 步行难度 is mandated — should be batch-corrected; (2) 绣球花庆典 used 21+ times instead of glossary canonical 绣球花节; (3) 英语向导 (3+ POIs) should be 英语导游; (4) overuse of templated structural words (锚点 25× / 招牌 57× / 标志性 24×) gives tour copy an AI-templated cadence. About two-thirds of tier-1 findings are false-positives because Chinese natively expresses 300,000 / 400,000 / 100 / 100,000 as 30万 / 40万 / 百日 / 10万 — the tier1 number-string matcher is over-strict for zh. Critical native-tone problems in 2 POIs (taejongdae artist name 池率元景李 mangled; ahopsan 古土哥 likely hallucinated; waujeongsa 海登大师 needs Hanja verification; ilchulland_themed_gardens 《你来自哪颗星》 likely wrong drama title). Most-problematic POI: poi:waujeongsa_temple (multiple AI-tone calques + Hanja verification needed). Recommended next pass: (a) global replace 强度→难度 in walking fields; (b) global replace 绣球花庆典→绣球花节; (c) global replace 英语向导→英语导游; (d) verify 4 proper-noun translations flagged above; (e) normalize punctuation to full-width Mainland zh.
